body:
## Context
Drum gear evolution pages chart how a drummer's kit changed album-to-album. Batch 1 (Portnoy + Haake + Dailor, #2512) and Batch 2 (Hoglan + Lombardo + Cavalera, #2671) both shipped. Current `/evolution/` has **8 drummers** in `drummerEvolution.js`. This batch adds 3 high-signal entities with zero evolution coverage.

## Why these 3
- **Danny Carey (Tool)** — top GSC multi-variant cluster (danny-carey-drum-kit, cymbals, setup); gear spans DW Collector's Series (Aenima era) → massive custom live rigs (Fear Inoculum era); 4 studio albums of documented changes
- **Matt Greiner (ABR)** — #1 GSC CTR this week (18.75% on 'matt greiner drum setup', 16 impr, 3 clicks); gear evolved from early Orange County Drum & Percussion eras through Pearl Reference → current Mapex Black Panther era
- **Shannon Larkin (Godsmack)** — GA4 darling (top page this week); GSC pos 4.8 / 13 impr / 0 clicks (title CTR gap); Tama Starclassic progression across 4+ Godsmack albums

## Data shape
Add to `packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` (same structure as batch 1/2):
```js
'danny-carey': {
  drummerSlug: 'danny-carey',
  eras: [
    { id: 'aenima', name: 'Ænima Era', years: '1994–1996', kitBrand: 'DW', kitModel: 'Collector\'s Series Maple', cymbalBrand: 'Paiste', cymbalModel: 'Signature series', ... },
    { id: 'lateralus', name: 'Lateralus Era', years: '2001', ... },
    { id: 'fear-inoculum', name: 'Fear Inoculum Era', years: '2019', ... },
  ]
},
'matt-greiner': { ... },
'shannon-larkin': { ... },
```

Create LLM files:
- `/public/llms/evolution/danny-carey.md`
- `/public/llms/evolution/matt-greiner.md`
- `/public/llms/evolution/shannon-larkin.md`

## Pages expected
- `/evolution/danny-carey` → DW Collector's Series → massive custom polyrhythm live rig
- `/evolution/matt-greiner` → budget roots → Pearl Reference → Mapex era
- `/evolution/shannon-larkin` → Tama Starclassic Performer MX → Starclassic Walnut/Birch modern

## Quality gate
- ≥3 distinct gear eras per drummer (album-era granularity)
- Each era: kit brand/model, cymbal brand/model, pedal, notable hardware changes
- Internal links to ≥2 existing album articles per drummer
- Schema: Person + timeline markup
- ≥300 words per evolution page

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves query buckets: `[drummer] drum evolution`, `[drummer] gear changes over the years`, `[drummer] drum setup history` — differentiates from static gear pages; AI citation anchor for "what gear did X use on [album] vs [later album]?"

## Dedup confirmed
Not in drummerEvolution.js (8 entries: lars-ulrich, joey-jordison, mike-portnoy, tomas-haake, brann-dailor, dave-lombardo, gene-hoglan, igor-cavalera). Not in any open seo-proposal after full sweep.

## Verify
1. `/evolution/danny-carey` renders with ≥3 gear eras
2. `/evolution/matt-greiner` renders with distinct era breakdown
3. `/evolution/shannon-larkin` renders with Tama progression
4. All 3 LLM files accessible at `/llms/evolution/[slug].md`
5. Each page links to ≥2 existing album/drummer pages

## Done
Batch 3 gear evolution pages live for Danny Carey, Matt Greiner, Shannon Larkin + 3 LLM files.
title: SEO batch: Drum gear evolution batch 3 — Danny Carey + Matt Greiner + Shannon Larkin (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
